internal-only.title: Internal-Only
internal-only.summary: Reachable only from LV3 private networks, loopback paths, or explicitly trusted control-plane hosts.
internal-only.approval_rule: This is the default tier for new APIs and HTTP callbacks. Do not publish these surfaces through public DNS or the public edge.

operator-only.title: Operator-Only
operator-only.summary: Reachable only from approved operator devices over private access such as Tailscale.
operator-only.approval_rule: These surfaces may be discoverable through an informational hostname, but the live API must stay private and require operator credentials.

public-edge.title: Public Edge
public-edge.summary: Intentionally published on a public domain through the named edge model.
public-edge.approval_rule: Public API publication requires an explicit ADR or approved implementation record plus a declared public hostname.

surfaces.title: Proxmox management API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only over the Proxmox host Tailscale address on port 8006.
surfaces.approval_notes: The public proxmox.lv3.org hostname remains informational only; routine administration stays on the private operator path.

surfaces.title: step-ca API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy for approved controller and trust-bootstrap traffic only.
surfaces.approval_notes: Keep the CA endpoint off the public edge and limit callers to trusted control-plane actors.

surfaces.title: OpenBao API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy and the runtime loopback listener, with client-certificate authentication on the external path.
surfaces.approval_notes: This secret-authority API stays private even though it has a host-level proxy; do not publish it through public DNS or NGINX.

surfaces.title: Windmill API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 8005.
surfaces.approval_notes: Windmill administrative and workflow APIs are operator-facing private surfaces, not public application endpoints.

surfaces.title: NetBox API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 8004.
surfaces.approval_notes: This is the private visual inventory plane for operators and repo-managed sync; do not publish it through public DNS or the NGINX edge.

surfaces.title: Portainer API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 9444.
surfaces.approval_notes: Portainer stays private-only for operator and governed wrapper use; do not publish it through public DNS or the NGINX edge.

surfaces.title: Mail gateway API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only on the LV3 private guest network at docker-runtime-lv3:8081.
surfaces.approval_notes: This is the sanctioned machine-facing mail automation API and must stay off the public edge.

surfaces.title: Mattermost operator API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 8066.
surfaces.approval_notes: Mattermost stays private-first and operator-only; future SSO may change authentication, not exposure.

surfaces.title: Open WebUI operator workbench
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 8008.
surfaces.approval_notes: This conversational operator surface stays private and requires approved operator credentials; do not publish it through the public edge.

surfaces.title: Platform context API
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy on port 8010 and requires the controller-local bearer token.
surfaces.approval_notes: This governed retrieval and tool API remains private-first and is intended for approved operators, Open WebUI global tools, and other authenticated internal agent runtimes.

surfaces.title: Stalwart mail event webhook
surfaces.reachability: Reachable only from the private mail-platform stack on docker-runtime-lv3.
surfaces.approval_notes: Event callbacks stay on private or container-local networks unless a future ADR approves explicit publication.

surfaces.title: Mattermost incoming webhooks
surfaces.reachability: Reachable on the private Mattermost runtime at docker-runtime-lv3:8065, with mirrored webhook ids retained under .local/mattermost for controlled routing.
surfaces.approval_notes: Treat these webhook ids as secret-bearing internal event sinks even though operator verification can traverse the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy.

surfaces.title: Platform finding event subjects
surfaces.reachability: Published only on the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime and consumed by approved internal subscribers.
surfaces.approval_notes: ADR 0071 finding subjects stay private-first and should not be bridged outside the internal event plane without an explicit follow-up ADR.

surfaces.title: Platform drift event subjects
surfaces.reachability: Published only on the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime and consumed by approved internal subscribers.
surfaces.approval_notes: ADR 0091 drift subjects stay private-first because they disclose real-time divergence between repo intent and live platform state.

surfaces.title: Platform security event subjects
surfaces.reachability: Published only on the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime and consumed by approved internal subscribers.
surfaces.approval_notes: ADR 0102 security posture subjects stay private-first because they expose active hardening gaps and live image vulnerability findings.

surfaces.title: Maintenance window event subjects
surfaces.reachability: Published only on the private docker-runtime-lv3 NATS runtime and consumed by approved internal subscribers.
surfaces.approval_notes: ADR 0080 maintenance subjects stay private-first because they disclose planned change timing and active alert-suppression scope.
